scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.deploy: cd readability-worker && npm install && npx wrangler deploy && cd .. && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote && npx pywrangler deploy
scripts.db:migrate: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote

GITHUB_CLIENT_ID.description: GitHub OAuth App **Client ID**. Create one at [github.com/settings/developers](https://github.com/settings/developers). Set the Callback URL to `<your-worker-url>/api/auth/callback`.

GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET.description: GitHub OAuth App **Client Secret** from the same OAuth App.

ALLOWED_EMAILS.description: Your GitHub email address (the one you log in with). Comma-separated for multiple users.

CF_ACCOUNT_ID.description: *(Optional)* Cloudflare Account ID — enables Browser Rendering for JS-heavy pages. Find it on the Workers dashboard sidebar.

CF_API_TOKEN.description: *(Optional)* Cloudflare API token — enables Browser Rendering. Create at dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens.
